Publications

Google Scholar ↗

Peer-reviewed articles, book chapters, and other scholarly outputs. * Equal contribution.

Journal Articles (3)

Journal Article 2024

A Blended Learning Course on the Diagnostics of Mental Disorders: Multicenter Cluster Randomized Noninferiority Trial

Bonnin, G., Kröber, S., Schneider, S., Margraf, J., Pflug, V., Gerlach, A. L., Slotta, T., Christiansen, H., Albrecht, B., Chavanon, M.-L., Hirschfeld, G., In-Albon, T., Thielsch, M. T., & von Brachel, R.

J Med Internet Res

Abstract

This multicenter cluster-randomized noninferiority trial evaluated a blended-learning program (DISKO) for teaching structured diagnostic interviews for mental disorders. With 350 students across multiple German universities, the study demonstrated that the blended-learning approach produced superior diagnostic knowledge and practical skills compared to traditional teaching formats.

doi:10.2196/54176
Journal Article 2024

How Happy Is Happy Enough? A Cross-cultural Comparison of Optimal Cut Points for the Positive Mental Health Scale

Bonnin, G., Hirschfeld, G., von Brachel, R., & Margraf, J.

Eur J Psychol Assess

Abstract

This study examined optimal cut-point values for the Positive Mental Health Scale across different cultural contexts, using item response theory and receiver operating characteristic analyses to identify empirically supported thresholds for distinguishing positive mental health from its absence.

doi:10.1027/1015-5759/a000850
Journal Article 2023

Therapists' Prototypes of Common Mental Disorders – An Empirical Identification

Kröber, S., Bonnin, G., Schneider, S., Merz, R., Hirschfeld, G., Hötzel, K., Lewer, M., & von Brachel, R.

Psychiatry Res Commun

Abstract

This study empirically identified prototypical cases of common mental disorders as perceived by practicing therapists, examining how implicit categorization processes shape diagnostic judgments in clinical practice.

doi:10.1016/j.psycom.2023.100144

Book Chapters (2)

Book Chapter 2024

Die Klassifikation Psychischer Störungen mit Diagnostischen Interviews

Bonnin, G., Kröber, S., & von Brachel, R.

Book chapter (Klinische Psychologie und Psychotherapie)

Book Chapter 2025

Diagnostische Interviews bei Psychischen Störungen

Bonnin, G., Buys, P., & von Brachel, R.

Book chapter (Handbuch FSP emotional-soziale Entwicklung)

Reports (1)

Report 2023

Digital Psychodiagnostic Interview for Mental Health Surveillance (MHS)

von Brachel, R., & Bonnin, G.

RKI Expert Report

Abstract

Expert report on clinical diagnostic interviews for mental health surveillance. Provides a systematic overview of internationally used clinical interviews, evaluation of their suitability for German-speaking populations, and practical recommendations for open-source digital implementation. Structured in three parts: evaluation criteria, systematic instrument overview, and practical recommendations.

Dissertation (1)

Dissertation 2025

Implicit and Explicit Categorization Processes in Clinical Psychology: Evidence-based Diagnostics, Optimal Cut-points, and Therapists' Prototypes

Bonnin, G.

PhD Dissertation, RUB

Abstract

Doctoral dissertation examining categorization processes in clinical psychology from multiple angles: the development and evaluation of evidence-based diagnostic training, empirical methods for deriving optimal cut-points in psychological assessment, and the implicit prototype structures that guide therapist diagnostic judgments.

doi:10.13154/294-12823
